law: L5: additive only. Merged into data/sourcea-ui-mechanical-gate-v1.json. No existing pattern removed or loosened.
evidence_basis: All patterns below confirmed live on sourcea.app 2026-07-06 by external fetch

forbidden_primary_phrases_add.why: unrendered template var, live in /sourcea/pricing footer at 12:3xZ
generic unrendered JS template guard (scan text nodes only if noisy)

regex_checks_add.why: em-dash stats live on homepage of a proof-branded product

structural_checks_add.rule: never fetch paths containing '*'; a _redirects splat is a rule, not a page. Rows with '*' are excluded from pass/fail math.
structural_checks_add.why: 5 literal-splat rows SPA-fallbacked to homepage and counted PASS in v1 run

structural_checks_add.rule: if body sha256 == homepage sha256 and path != '/', mark SPA_FALLBACK not PASS
discover paths from live sitemap.xml + live link BFS; emit (live_only, dist_only) diff as DRIFT receipt each run
structural_checks_add.why: path universe must not be controlled by the machine that built the site (L4/L12)

structural_checks_add.rule: footer legal entity string identical across all pages; expected 'Noetfield Systems Inc.'
primary nav link-set: max 2 distinct fingerprints site-wide (marketing + app shell)
structural_checks_add.why: homepage nav != /sourcea/ subsite nav, confirmed live

structural_checks_add.rule: every $ figure on any page must exist in the canonical pricing table
audit receipts written to repo reports/ only; receipt body must itself pass path_leak gate
structural_checks_add.why: v1 receipt written to ~/.sina and contained /Users/sinakazemnezhad path

reclassify.why: commercial SKU landers with zero contact surface = dead-end money pages, not sign-in screens

verify_law: The agent that fixes the 27 failures may not produce the PASS. Re-run from a different runner (Railway or founder Mac), >=60s after deploy, full-body hash per page.
